exact_pr_head: Recorded in pull request metadata after this receipt commit to avoid a self-referential hash.
execution_controls: The executor triggers only from an owner edit to issue #160 with an exact title and exact authorization lines.
The target SHA must equal the default-branch event SHA and the checked-out source SHA.
The authorization title is changed immediately after validation to prevent retrigger.
The provider job uses macos-latest and the protected paid-asset-generation environment.
No Spatial promotion token is exposed and no promotion step exists.
All remote actions are pinned to immutable commits.
A separate read-only exact-head workflow verifies the one-time authority contract before merge.
The workflow comments the run identifier and final execution result on issue #160.
runtime_impact: None until the exact workflow is merged and issue #160 is edited with the resulting exact main SHA.
budget_impact: At most one provider attempt and USD 1.00 after explicit issue-bound trigger; zero while this candidate remains unmerged.
promotion_impact: None. Promotion is disabled and no promotion credential is available.
limitations: The connector does not expose workflow_dispatch or GitHub environment settings APIs.
The environment will fail closed if provider secrets or required approval are absent.
The one-time executor must be deleted after the run is conclusively recorded.
status: ONE-TIME EXECUTOR IMPLEMENTED — EXACT-HEAD VERIFICATION PENDING — NO SPEND YET
rollback: Close the pull request or revert/delete the one-time workflow before editing issue #160. After execution, remove the executor and its integrity workflow in a cleanup pull request.
exact_next_action: Open the draft PR, require One-Time Paid V1 Integrity success on the exact head, merge under exact-head protection, record the resulting main SHA in issue #160, and perform one owner edit to trigger the bounded run.
